data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md Phase 1 output format documentation reflects 6-field BLOCKED format: BLOCKED\t<id>\tP<priority>\t<title>\t<child_count>\t<blocker_ids>
- [ ] SKILL.md documents the 5th BLOCKING field for unblocked/in-progress epics that block others
- [ ] /dso:sprint Phase 1 epic selection display instructions reference the new fields for rendering
- [ ] No code changes to sprint-list-epics.sh (docs-only task)
  Verify: git diff --name-only | grep -v SKILL.md | grep -c . | grep -q 0

## File Impact
- Docs: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Phase 1 sections)
